testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.RollbackCoordinatorTest

testcase.name: cascading rollback restores earliest checkpoint and cleans later ones
rollback deletes the checkpoint after restoring

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.653 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.653 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.653 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 08:31:27.653 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.RollbackCoordinator -- Rolled back to checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results restored) 08:31:27.653 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-2 08:31:27.653 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.RollbackCoordinator -- Rolled back to checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results restored) 08:31:27.654 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results) 08:31:27.654 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-2 for workflow wf-1 (2 task results) 08:31:27.654 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 08:31:27.654 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.RollbackCoordinator -- Rolled back to checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results restored) 08:31:27.655 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results) 08:31:27.655 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 08:31:27.655 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.RollbackCoordinator -- Rolled back to checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (0 task results restored) 08:31:27.656 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Saved checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results) 08:31:27.656 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.CheckpointManager -- Deleted checkpoint cp-1 08:31:27.656 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.RollbackCoordinator -- Rolled back to checkpoint cp-1 for workflow wf-1 (1 task results restored)
